briefdescription.para: This function does polled mode transfer in slave mode.

detaileddescription.para: It first sends to master then receives.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the polled slave example.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful, XST_FAILURE if unsuccessful.

briefdescription.para: This example can run on zynqmp / versal platform evaluation board and IIC controller configured slave in polled mode and loopback setup used for master.

detaileddescription.para: It sends and receives the data using IIC device as slave for SMBus transfers.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 gm 05/10/22 First release 3.18 gm 07/14/23 Added SDT support. 3.22 bkv 07/09/25 Fixed GCC Warning. 3.23 vlt 12/17/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details.
